name: io.github.telekash/mcp-server
description: Prediction market probability oracle for AI agents. Query 480+ live markets from Kalshi (CFTC-regulated) & Polymarket. Real-time odds, AI sentiment analysis, trend history, momentum detection, and cross-source odds comparison. The only MCP that aggregates both regulated and unregulated prediction markets.

environmentVariables.description: Supabase project URL for TeleKash database
environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Supabase anonymous key for read access to prediction markets
environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
